categories.label: In-Game VP
categories.description: VP earned during the 6 rounds from building, scoring tiles, power actions, town tiles, and favor tiles

categories.label: Fire Cult Scoring
categories.description: End-game VP from position on the Fire cult track (8/4/2 for 1st/2nd/3rd)

categories.label: Water Cult Scoring
categories.description: End-game VP from position on the Water cult track (8/4/2 for 1st/2nd/3rd)

categories.label: Earth Cult Scoring
categories.description: End-game VP from position on the Earth cult track (8/4/2 for 1st/2nd/3rd)

categories.label: Air Cult Scoring
categories.description: End-game VP from position on the Air cult track (8/4/2 for 1st/2nd/3rd)

categories.label: Largest Connected Network
categories.description: End-game VP for largest connected group of structures (18/12/6 for 1st/2nd/3rd)

win_condition: Player with the most total VP after 6 rounds and final scoring wins
